records.question: Which users named Helen have reviewed the item titled avocado?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'avocado' AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id join item on review.i_id = item.i_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and lower(item.title) like '%avocado%' limit 5
records.thought: Join useracct, review, and item tables to find users named Helen who reviewed the item titled avocado.

records.question: Which users named Helen have reviews with a rank exactly equal to 3?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rank = 3 AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and review.rank = 3 limit 5
records.thought: I need to find users named Helen and join with reviews where the rank is exactly 3, then select their user IDs.

records.question: Which user accounts have written reviews with a rank of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE review.rank >= 1
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id where review.rank >= 1 limit 5
records.thought: Select user accounts that have written reviews with a rank of at least 1 by joining useracct and review tables and filtering on review.rank.

records.question: Which users named Helen gave a 5-star review to the shampoo product?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE item.title = 'shampoo' AND review.rating = 5 AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id join item on review.i_id = item.i_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and review.rating = 5 and lower(item.title) like '%shampoo%' limit 5;
records.thought: Find users named Helen who gave a 5-star rating to an item with 'shampoo' in its title by joining useracct, review, and item tables.

records.question: Who in the user accounts has the name Mark?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct where lower(useracct.name) like '%mark%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find users with the name Mark, filter the useracct table by name using a case-insensitive like condition and select their u_id.

records.question: Which users named Helen have reviews with a rating exactly 10 and a rank of at least 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rank >= 1 AND useracct.name = 'Helen' AND review.rating = 10
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and review.rating = 10 and review.rank >= 1 limit 5
records.thought: Filter users named Helen and join with reviews having rating 10 and rank >= 1 to find matching user IDs.

records.question: Which user accounts belong to Mark and have reviews with a rank of at most 7?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark' AND review.rank <= 7
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%mark%' and review.rank <= 7 limit 5
records.thought: Filter user accounts with names like 'mark' and join with reviews having rank at most 7 to find matching user IDs.

records.question: What user accounts named Helen have reviews with a rating of at most 5 and a rank of at least 5?
records.gold_sql:

JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
WHERE review.rating <= 5 AND review.rank >= 5 AND useracct.name = 'Helen'
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%helen%' and review.rating <= 5 and review.rank >= 5 limit 5
records.thought: Filter user accounts named Helen and join with reviews having rating <= 5 and rank >= 5 to get the user IDs.

records.question: Which users named Mark have given a rank 2 review with a rating of at most 5 for the item titled orange?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT useracct.u_id FROM useracct
JOIN review ON useracct.u_id = review.u_id
JOIN item ON review.i_id = item.i_id
WHERE useracct.name = 'Mark' AND review.rank = 2 AND item.title = 'orange' AND review.rating <= 5
records.pred_sql: select useracct.u_id from useracct join review on useracct.u_id = review.u_id join item on review.i_id = item.i_id where lower(useracct.name) like '%mark%' and review.rank = 2 and review.rating <= 5 and lower(item.title) like '%orange%' limit 5
records.thought: Filter users named Mark, join with reviews having rank 2 and rating at most 5, and join with items titled orange to find matching user IDs.
